requirements.topic: Right to Object for Research Purposes
requirements.requirement: The data subject shall have the right to object to the processing of personal data for scientific or historical research purposes unless necessary for public interest.
must_cover: processing of personal data for research purposes
conditions: the objection is based on the data subject's particular situation
requirements.source_quote: Where personal data are processed for scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes pursuant to Article 89(1), the data subject, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, shall have the right to object to processing of personal data concerning him or her, unless the processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out for reasons of public interest.

source_refs.source_quote: Where personal data are processed for scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes pursuant to Article 89(1), the data subject, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, shall have the right to object to processing of personal data concerning him or her, unless the processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out for reasons of public interest.

requirements.requirement: The data subject shall have the right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling.
requirements.source_quote: The data subject shall have the right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling, which produces legal effects concerning him or her or similarly significantly affects him or her.

source_refs.source_quote: The data subject shall have the right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling, which produces legal effects concerning him or her or similarly significantly affects him or her.

requirements.requirement: Decisions based solely on automated processing are permitted if necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller.
requirements.source_quote: is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;

source_refs.source_quote: is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;

requirements.requirement: Decisions based solely on automated processing are permitted if authorized by Union or Member State law, which lays down suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms.
requirements.source_quote: is authorised by Union or Member State law to which the controller is subject and which also lays down suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests;

source_refs.source_quote: is authorised by Union or Member State law to which the controller is subject and which also lays down suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests;

requirements.requirement: Decisions based solely on automated processing are permitted if based on the data subject’s explicit consent.
requirements.source_quote: is based on the data subject’s explicit consent.

source_refs.source_quote: is based on the data subject’s explicit consent.

requirements.requirement: The data controller shall implement suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms, including the right to obtain human intervention, to express his or her point of view, and to contest the decision.
conditions: applicable in cases of points (a) and (c) of paragraph 2
requirements.source_quote: the data controller shall implement suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests, at least the right to obtain human intervention on the part of the controller, to express his or her point of view and to contest the decision.

source_refs.source_quote: the data controller shall implement suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests, at least the right to obtain human intervention on the part of the controller, to express his or her point of view and to contest the decision.

requirements.topic: Prohibition on special categories of personal data
requirements.requirement: Decisions based on special categories of personal data are prohibited unless specific conditions are met.
conditions: point (a) or (g) of Article 9(2) applies
suitable measures to safeguard rights are in place
requirements.source_quote: Decisions referred to in paragraph 2 shall not be based on special categories of personal data referred to in Article 9(1), unless point (a) or (g) of Article 9(2) applies and suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests are in place.

source_refs.source_quote: Decisions referred to in paragraph 2 shall not be based on special categories of personal data referred to in Article 9(1), unless point (a) or (g) of Article 9(2) applies and suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests are in place.

requirements.requirement: Union or Member State law may restrict the obligations and rights provided for in Articles 12 to 22 and Article 34, as well as Article 5, when necessary and proportionate.
conditions: must respect the essence of fundamental rights
must be necessary and proportionate in a democratic society
requirements.source_quote: Union or Member State law to which the data controller or processor is subject may restrict by way of a legislative measure the scope of the obligations and rights provided for in Articles 12 to 22 and Article 34...

source_refs.source_quote: Union or Member State law to which the data controller or processor is subject may restrict by way of a legislative measure the scope of the obligations and rights provided for in Articles 12 to 22 and Article 34...

requirements.requirement: Any legislative measure shall contain specific provisions regarding the purposes of processing, categories of processing, scope of restrictions, safeguards, specification of controllers, storage periods, risks to rights and freedoms, and the right of data subjects to be informed.
conditions: where relevant
requirements.source_quote: In particular, any legislative measure referred to in paragraph 1 shall contain specific provisions at least, where relevant, as to...

source_refs.source_quote: In particular, any legislative measure referred to in paragraph 1 shall contain specific provisions at least, where relevant, as to...

requirements.requirement: The controller shall provide the data subject with information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing.
must_cover: the period for which the personal data will be stored
the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or a third party
the existence of the right to request access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection to processing, and data portability
the right to withdraw consent at any time
the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
the source of the personal data
the existence of automated decision-making and profiling
requirements.source_quote: the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing in respect of the data subject

source_refs.source_quote: the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing in respect of the data subject

requirements.requirement: The controller shall provide the information within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month.
requirements.source_quote: within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month

source_refs.source_quote: within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month

requirements.requirement: The controller shall provide the data subject with information on any further processing of personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were obtained.
requirements.source_quote: the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose

source_refs.source_quote: the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose

requirements.requirement: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure and demonstrate that processing is performed in accordance with this Regulation.
conditions: measures must be reviewed and updated where necessary
requirements.source_quote: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure and to be able to demonstrate that processing is performed in accordance with this Regulation.

source_refs.source_quote: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure and to be able to demonstrate that processing is performed in accordance with this Regulation.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall implement appropriate data protection policies where proportionate in relation to processing activities.
conditions: proportionate to processing activities
requirements.source_quote: The measures referred to in paragraph 1 shall include the implementation of appropriate data protection policies by the controller.

source_refs.source_quote: The measures referred to in paragraph 1 shall include the implementation of appropriate data protection policies by the controller.

requirements.requirement: Adherence to approved codes of conduct or approved certification mechanisms may be used to demonstrate compliance with the obligations of the controller.
requirements.source_quote: Adherence to approved codes of conduct as referred to in Article 40 or approved certification mechanisms as referred to in Article 42 may be used as an element by which to demonstrate compliance with the obligations of the controller.

source_refs.source_quote: Adherence to approved codes of conduct as referred to in Article 40 or approved certification mechanisms as referred to in Article 42 may be used as an element by which to demonstrate compliance with the obligations of the controller.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure data protection principles are effectively integrated into processing.
conditions: at the time of determination of means for processing
at the time of processing
requirements.source_quote: the controller shall, both at the time of the determination of the means for processing and at the time of the processing itself, implement appropriate technical and organisational measures

source_refs.source_quote: the controller shall, both at the time of the determination of the means for processing and at the time of the processing itself, implement appropriate technical and organisational measures

requirements.requirement: The controller shall ensure that, by default, only personal data necessary for each specific purpose of processing are processed.
requirements.source_quote: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures for ensuring that, by default, only personal data which are necessary for each specific purpose of the processing are processed.

source_refs.source_quote: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures for ensuring that, by default, only personal data which are necessary for each specific purpose of the processing are processed.

requirements.requirement: An approved certification mechanism may be used to demonstrate compliance with the requirements set out in paragraphs 1 and 2.
requirements.source_quote: An approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 may be used as an element to demonstrate compliance with the requirements set out in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article.

source_refs.source_quote: An approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 may be used as an element to demonstrate compliance with the requirements set out in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article.

requirements.requirement: Joint controllers shall determine their respective responsibilities for compliance with the obligations under this Regulation.
must_cover: exercising of the rights of the data subject
providing information referred to in Articles 13 and 14
conditions: unless determined by Union or Member State law
requirements.source_quote: They shall in a transparent manner determine their respective responsibilities for compliance with the obligations under this Regulation...

source_refs.source_quote: They shall in a transparent manner determine their respective responsibilities for compliance with the obligations under this Regulation...

requirements.requirement: The arrangement between joint controllers shall duly reflect their respective roles and relationships vis-à-vis the data subjects.
must_cover: roles and relationships of the joint controllers
requirements.source_quote: The arrangement referred to in paragraph 1 shall duly reflect the respective roles and relationships of the joint controllers vis-à-vis the data subjects.

source_refs.source_quote: The arrangement referred to in paragraph 1 shall duly reflect the respective roles and relationships of the joint controllers vis-à-vis the data subjects.

requirements.requirement: The essence of the arrangement shall be made available to the data subject.
requirements.source_quote: The essence of the arrangement shall be made available to the data subject.

source_refs.source_quote: The essence of the arrangement shall be made available to the data subject.

requirements.requirement: The data subject may exercise his or her rights under this Regulation in respect of and against each of the controllers.
requirements.source_quote: the data subject may exercise his or her rights under this Regulation in respect of and against each of the controllers.

source_refs.source_quote: the data subject may exercise his or her rights under this Regulation in respect of and against each of the controllers.

requirements.requirement: The controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union.
conditions: Article 3(2) applies
requirements.source_quote: The controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union.

source_refs.source_quote: The controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall use only processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures.
requirements.source_quote: the controller shall use only processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures

source_refs.source_quote: the controller shall use only processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures

requirements.requirement: The processor shall not engage another processor without prior specific or general written authorisation of the controller.
requirements.source_quote: The processor shall not engage another processor without prior specific or general written authorisation of the controller.

source_refs.source_quote: The processor shall not engage another processor without prior specific or general written authorisation of the controller.

requirements.requirement: Processing by a processor shall be governed by a contract that is binding on the processor with regard to the controller.
must_cover: obligations and rights of the controller
requirements.source_quote: Processing by a processor shall be governed by a contract or other legal act... that is binding on the processor with regard to the controller.

source_refs.source_quote: Processing by a processor shall be governed by a contract or other legal act... that is binding on the processor with regard to the controller.

requirements.requirement: The processor processes the personal data only on documented instructions from the controller.
conditions: unless required by Union or Member State law
requirements.source_quote: processes the personal data only on documented instructions from the controller

source_refs.source_quote: processes the personal data only on documented instructions from the controller

requirements.requirement: The processor ensures that persons authorized to process the personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality.
requirements.source_quote: ensures that persons authorised to process the personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality

source_refs.source_quote: ensures that persons authorised to process the personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality

requirements.requirement: The processor takes all measures required pursuant to Article 32.
requirements.source_quote: takes all measures required pursuant to Article 32

source_refs.source_quote: takes all measures required pursuant to Article 32

requirements.requirement: The processor assists the controller by appropriate technical and organisational measures for the fulfilment of the controller’s obligation to respond to requests for exercising the data subject’s rights.
requirements.source_quote: assists the controller by appropriate technical and organisational measures

source_refs.source_quote: assists the controller by appropriate technical and organisational measures

requirements.requirement: The processor assists the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to Articles 32 to 36.
requirements.source_quote: assists the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to Articles 32 to 36

source_refs.source_quote: assists the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to Articles 32 to 36

requirements.requirement: The processor shall delete or return all the personal data to the controller after the end of the provision of services relating to processing.
conditions: unless Union or Member State law requires storage
requirements.source_quote: deletes or returns all the personal data to the controller after the end of the provision of services

source_refs.source_quote: deletes or returns all the personal data to the controller after the end of the provision of services

requirements.requirement: The processor makes available to the controller all information necessary to demonstrate compliance with the obligations laid down in this Article.
requirements.source_quote: makes available to the controller all information necessary to demonstrate compliance

source_refs.source_quote: makes available to the controller all information necessary to demonstrate compliance

requirements.requirement: The same data protection obligations shall be imposed on that other processor by way of a contract.
requirements.source_quote: the same data protection obligations as set out in the contract... shall be imposed on that other processor

source_refs.source_quote: the same data protection obligations as set out in the contract... shall be imposed on that other processor

requirements.requirement: The contract or the other legal act shall be in writing, including in electronic form.
requirements.source_quote: The contract or the other legal act... shall be in writing, including in electronic form.

source_refs.source_quote: The contract or the other legal act... shall be in writing, including in electronic form.

requirements.requirement: Each controller shall maintain a record of processing activities under its responsibility.
must_cover: name and contact details of the controller
description of categories of data subjects
description of categories of personal data
categories of recipients of personal data
transfers of personal data to third countries or international organisations
requirements.responsible_party: controller and, where applicable, the controller’s representative
requirements.source_quote: Each controller and, where applicable, the controller’s representative, shall maintain a record of processing activities under its responsibility.

source_refs.source_quote: Each controller and, where applicable, the controller’s representative, shall maintain a record of processing activities under its responsibility.

requirements.requirement: Implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk.
must_cover: pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data
ongoing confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services
restoration of availability and access to personal data in a timely manner
regular testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of security measures
requirements.source_quote: the controller and the processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk

source_refs.source_quote: the controller and the processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk

requirements.requirement: Ensure that any natural person acting under the authority of the controller or the processor who has access to personal data does not process them except on instructions from the controller.
conditions: unless required to do so by Union or Member State law
requirements.source_quote: the controller and processor shall take steps to ensure that any natural person acting under the authority of the controller or the processor who has access to personal data does not process them except on instructions from the controller

source_refs.source_quote: the controller and processor shall take steps to ensure that any natural person acting under the authority of the controller or the processor who has access to personal data does not process them except on instructions from the controller

requirements.requirement: Notify supervisory authorities of personal data breaches.
requirements.source_quote: the notification of personal data breaches to supervisory authorities and the communication of such personal data breaches to data subjects;

source_refs.source_quote: the notification of personal data breaches to supervisory authorities and the communication of such personal data breaches to data subjects;

requirements.requirement: Ensure appropriate safeguards for the transfer of personal data to third countries or international organisations.
conditions: binding and enforceable commitments
appropriate safeguards
requirements.source_quote: Such controllers or processors shall make binding and enforceable commitments, via contractual or other legally binding instruments, to apply those appropriate safeguards including with regard to the rights of data subjects.

source_refs.source_quote: Such controllers or processors shall make binding and enforceable commitments, via contractual or other legally binding instruments, to apply those appropriate safeguards including with regard to the rights of data subjects.

requirements.requirement: Submit draft code of conduct or amendments to the supervisory authority for approval.
requirements.source_quote: Associations and other bodies...shall submit the draft code, amendment or extension to the supervisory authority which is competent pursuant to Article 55.

source_refs.source_quote: Associations and other bodies...shall submit the draft code, amendment or extension to the supervisory authority which is competent pursuant to Article 55.

requirements.requirement: Obtain approval from the supervisory authority for the draft code, amendment, or extension.
conditions: compliance with this Regulation
sufficient appropriate safeguards
requirements.source_quote: The supervisory authority shall provide an opinion on whether the draft code, amendment or extension complies with this Regulation and shall approve that draft code, amendment or extension if it finds that it provides sufficient appropriate safeguards.

source_refs.source_quote: The supervisory authority shall provide an opinion on whether the draft code, amendment or extension complies with this Regulation and shall approve that draft code, amendment or extension if it finds that it provides sufficient appropriate safeguards.

requirements.requirement: Register and publish the approved code of conduct if it does not relate to processing activities in several Member States.
conditions: does not relate to processing activities in several Member States
requirements.source_quote: the supervisory authority shall register and publish the code.

source_refs.source_quote: the supervisory authority shall register and publish the code.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall notify the supervisory authority of a personal data breach without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after becoming aware of it.
conditions: The personal data breach is not unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons.
requirements.source_quote: In the case of a personal data breach, the controller shall without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it, notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority...

source_refs.source_quote: In the case of a personal data breach, the controller shall without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it, notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority...

requirements.requirement: If the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours, it shall be accompanied by reasons for the delay.
requirements.source_quote: Where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours, it shall be accompanied by reasons for the delay.

source_refs.source_quote: Where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours, it shall be accompanied by reasons for the delay.

requirements.requirement: The processor shall notify the controller without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal data breach.
requirements.source_quote: The processor shall notify the controller without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal data breach.

source_refs.source_quote: The processor shall notify the controller without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal data breach.

requirements.requirement: The notification to the supervisory authority shall describe the nature of the personal data breach, including the categories and approximate number of data subjects and personal data records concerned.
requirements.source_quote: The notification referred to in paragraph 1 shall at least describe the nature of the personal data breach including where possible, the categories and approximate number of data subjects concerned and the categories and approximate number of personal data records concerned;

source_refs.source_quote: The notification referred to in paragraph 1 shall at least describe the nature of the personal data breach including where possible, the categories and approximate number of data subjects concerned and the categories and approximate number of personal data records concerned;

requirements.requirement: The notification shall communicate the name and contact details of the data protection officer or other contact point for more information.
requirements.source_quote: The notification shall communicate the name and contact details of the data protection officer or other contact point where more information can be obtained;

source_refs.source_quote: The notification shall communicate the name and contact details of the data protection officer or other contact point where more information can be obtained;

requirements.requirement: The notification shall describe the likely consequences of the personal data breach.
requirements.source_quote: The notification shall describe the likely consequences of the personal data breach;

source_refs.source_quote: The notification shall describe the likely consequences of the personal data breach;

requirements.requirement: The notification shall describe the measures taken or proposed to be taken by the controller to address the personal data breach.
requirements.source_quote: The notification shall describe the measures taken or proposed to be taken by the controller to address the personal data breach, including, where appropriate, measures to mitigate its possible adverse effects.

source_refs.source_quote: The notification shall describe the measures taken or proposed to be taken by the controller to address the personal data breach, including, where appropriate, measures to mitigate its possible adverse effects.

requirements.requirement: Where it is not possible to provide all information at the same time, the information may be provided in phases without undue further delay.
requirements.source_quote: Where, and in so far as, it is not possible to provide the information at the same time, the information may be provided in phases without undue further delay.

source_refs.source_quote: Where, and in so far as, it is not possible to provide the information at the same time, the information may be provided in phases without undue further delay.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall document any personal data breaches, comprising the facts relating to the breach, its effects, and the remedial action taken.
requirements.source_quote: The controller shall document any personal data breaches, comprising the facts relating to the personal data breach, its effects and the remedial action taken.

source_refs.source_quote: The controller shall document any personal data breaches, comprising the facts relating to the personal data breach, its effects and the remedial action taken.

requirements.requirement: The documentation shall enable the supervisory authority to verify compliance with this Article.
requirements.source_quote: That documentation shall enable the supervisory authority to verify compliance with this Article.

source_refs.source_quote: That documentation shall enable the supervisory authority to verify compliance with this Article.

requirements.requirement: The controller shall communicate the personal data breach to the data subject without undue delay when it is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons.
must_cover: high risk to rights and freedoms
requirements.source_quote: When the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, the controller shall communicate the personal data breach to the data subject without undue delay.

source_refs.source_quote: When the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, the controller shall communicate the personal data breach to the data subject without undue delay.

requirements.requirement: The communication to the data subject shall describe in clear and plain language the nature of the personal data breach and contain at least the information and measures referred to in points (b), (c) and (d) of Article 33(3).
requirements.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall describe in clear and plain language the nature of the personal data breach and contain at least the information and measures referred to in points (b), (c) and (d) of Article 33(3).

source_refs.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall describe in clear and plain language the nature of the personal data breach and contain at least the information and measures referred to in points (b), (c) and (d) of Article 33(3).

requirements.requirement: Communication to the data subject is not required if the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures that were applied to the personal data affected by the breach.
must_cover: appropriate technical and organisational protection measures
conditions: measures render personal data unintelligible
such as encryption
requirements.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall not be required if the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures, and those measures were applied to the personal data affected by the personal data breach.

source_refs.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall not be required if the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures, and those measures were applied to the personal data affected by the personal data breach.

requirements.requirement: Communication to the data subject is not required if the controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects is no longer likely to materialise.
must_cover: ensure high risk no longer likely
requirements.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall not be required if the controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects referred to in paragraph 1 is no longer likely to materialise.

source_refs.source_quote: The communication to the data subject shall not be required if the controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects referred to in paragraph 1 is no longer likely to materialise.

requirements.requirement: Communication to the data subject is not required if it would involve disproportionate effort, in which case there shall instead be a public communication or similar measure.
requirements.source_quote: It would involve disproportionate effort. In such a case, there shall instead be a public communication or similar measure whereby the data subjects are informed in an equally effective manner.

source_refs.source_quote: It would involve disproportionate effort. In such a case, there shall instead be a public communication or similar measure whereby the data subjects are informed in an equally effective manner.

requirements.requirement: If the controller has not communicated the personal data breach to the data subject, the supervisory authority may require it to do so.
requirements.source_quote: If the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject, the supervisory authority, having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk, may require it to do so.

source_refs.source_quote: If the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject, the supervisory authority, having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk, may require it to do so.

requirements.source_quote: to cooperate with the supervisory authority;

source_refs.source_quote: to act as the contact point for the supervisory authority on issues relating to processing,

requirements.topic: Risk Assessment by Data Protection Officer
requirements.requirement: Data protection officer shall have due regard to the risk associated with processing operations.
requirements.source_quote: the data protection officer shall in the performance of his or her tasks have due regard to the risk associated with processing operations, taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing.

source_refs.source_quote: the data protection officer shall in the performance of his or her tasks have due regard to the risk associated with processing operations, taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing.

conditions: absence of measures to mitigate the risk
requirements.source_quote: The controller shall consult the supervisory authority prior to processing where a data protection impact assessment under Article 35 indicates that the processing would result in a high risk in the absence of measures taken by the controller to mitigate the risk.

source_refs.source_quote: The controller shall consult the supervisory authority prior to processing where a data protection impact assessment under Article 35 indicates that the processing would result in a high risk in the absence of measures taken by the controller to mitigate the risk.

source_refs.source_quote: The supervisory authority shall, within period of up to eight weeks of receipt of the request for consultation, provide written advice to the controller...

requirements.deadline: within one month of receipt of the request for consultation

source_refs.source_quote: That period may be extended by six weeks, taking into account the complexity of the intended processing.

source_refs.source_quote: the controller shall provide the supervisory authority with: the respective responsibilities of the controller, joint controllers and processors involved in the processing, the purposes and means of the intended processing, the measures and safeguards provided to protect the rights and freedoms of data subjects...
